urgent_methodology: Publisher-marked Breaking, Urgent, Alert, Just in, Developing or similar items are collected first and receive priority over standard items, unless they are liveblogs, programme previews or low-value content.

latest.title: Marathon runners compete on drifting sea ice at North Pole
latest.summary: Twenty-three runners from seven countries participated in the marathon at the North Pole. The event was organized on drifting sea ice, and competitors wore thermal gear and life vests for safety.
latest.details: Twenty-three runners from seven countries participated in the marathon at the North Pole. The event was organized on drifting sea ice, and competitors wore thermal gear and life vests for safety. Denmark's Rikke Dam and China's Wang Shengxian won the women's and men's titles, respectively. The course was reported to have disappeared just hours after the races concluded.
latest.full_brief: Twenty-three runners from seven countries participated in the marathon at the North Pole. The event was organized on drifting sea ice, and competitors wore thermal gear and life vests for safety. Denmark's Rikke Dam and China's Wang Shengxian won the women's and men's titles, respectively. The course was reported to have disappeared just hours after the races concluded.

latest.title: Ferry carrying 116 passengers sinks off Guyana coast, authorities say
latest.summary: A ferry named MV Barima sank off the coast of Guyana while carrying 116 passengers. So far, 53 individuals have been rescued, including both passengers and crew members.
latest.details: A ferry named MV Barima sank off the coast of Guyana while carrying 116 passengers. So far, 53 individuals have been rescued, including both passengers and crew members. The ferry capsized near Iron Punt during its route from Georgetown to Port Kaituma. Authorities have set up three assistance centers for the relatives of those affected.
latest.full_brief: A ferry named MV Barima sank off the coast of Guyana while carrying 116 passengers. So far, 53 individuals have been rescued, including both passengers and crew members. The ferry capsized near Iron Punt during its route from Georgetown to Port Kaituma. Authorities have set up three assistance centers for the relatives of those affected.

latest.title: Russia launches major ballistic missile attack on Ukrainian cities
latest.summary: Russia has launched a series of ballistic missile strikes on Ukrainian cities, resulting in five fatalities and at least 35 injuries. The northeastern city of Kharkiv and the capital Kyiv were among the hardest hit, with significant damage reported.
latest.details: Russia has launched a series of ballistic missile strikes on Ukrainian cities, resulting in five fatalities and at least 35 injuries. The northeastern city of Kharkiv and the capital Kyiv were among the hardest hit, with significant damage reported. Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelensky described the attack on Kyiv as one of the most massive since the invasion began. In response, Ukraine has targeted Russian oil tankers and facilities, claiming successful strikes on multiple sites.
latest.full_brief: Russia has launched a series of ballistic missile strikes on Ukrainian cities, resulting in five fatalities and at least 35 injuries. The northeastern city of Kharkiv and the capital Kyiv were among the hardest hit, with significant damage reported. Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelensky described the attack on Kyiv as one of the most massive since the invasion began. In response, Ukraine has targeted Russian oil tankers and facilities, claiming successful strikes on multiple sites.

latest.title: Government use of automated AI decision-making to be curbed under new Australian rules
latest.summary: The Australian government is working on new rules to regulate the use of automated AI decision-making in federal departments. This initiative aims to ensure safety, fairness, accuracy, and transparency in AI processes.
latest.details: The Australian government is working on new rules to regulate the use of automated AI decision-making in federal departments. This initiative aims to ensure safety, fairness, accuracy, and transparency in AI processes. The attorney general, Michelle Rowland, is leading the development of these rules. Additionally, a digital duty of care legislation is being progressed to hold AI companies accountable for safety features.
latest.full_brief: The Australian government is working on new rules to regulate the use of automated AI decision-making in federal departments. This initiative aims to ensure safety, fairness, accuracy, and transparency in AI processes. The attorney general, Michelle Rowland, is leading the development of these rules. Additionally, a digital duty of care legislation is being progressed to hold AI companies accountable for safety features.

latest.title: The future of physical games is not looking great
latest.summary: Players and game preservationists might need to prepare for a world without discs. Digital libraries are increasingly convenient, especially as console makers have made efforts to keep backwards compatibility across generations.
latest.details: Players and game preservationists might need to prepare for a world without discs. Digital libraries are increasingly convenient, especially as console makers have made efforts to keep backwards compatibility across generations. Capcom reported that an astounding 93 percent of its game sales were for digital copies in its last fiscal year. Many of the most popular games are only available digitally, like Roblox and Fortnite.
latest.full_brief: Players and game preservationists might need to prepare for a world without discs. Digital libraries are increasingly convenient, especially as console makers have made efforts to keep backwards compatibility across generations. Capcom reported that an astounding 93 percent of its game sales were for digital copies in its last fiscal year. Many of the most popular games are only available digitally, like Roblox and Fortnite.

latest.title: Messi on the brink of history - will it be his last World Cup game?
latest.summary: Lionel Messi's performance is crucial for Argentina as they aim to win consecutive World Cups. If successful, he would become the first captain to lift the trophy twice.
latest.details: Lionel Messi's performance is crucial for Argentina as they aim to win consecutive World Cups. If successful, he would become the first captain to lift the trophy twice. Messi is currently just one goal behind Kylian Mbappe in the race to become the World Cup's all-time leading scorer. There is speculation about whether this will be Messi's last World Cup appearance, with discussions about his potential participation in the 2030 tournament.
latest.full_brief: Lionel Messi's performance is crucial for Argentina as they aim to win consecutive World Cups. If successful, he would become the first captain to lift the trophy twice. Messi is currently just one goal behind Kylian Mbappe in the race to become the World Cup's all-time leading scorer. There is speculation about whether this will be Messi's last World Cup appearance, with discussions about his potential participation in the 2030 tournament.

latest.title: Cuban dissident Luis Manuel Otero Alcántara goes into exile in US
latest.summary: Luis Manuel Otero Alcántara, a prominent Cuban dissident, has gone into exile in the US after serving a five-year prison sentence. He is the leader of the San Isidro Movement, which advocates for freedom of speech and democracy in Cuba.
latest.details: Luis Manuel Otero Alcántara, a prominent Cuban dissident, has gone into exile in the US after serving a five-year prison sentence. He is the leader of the San Isidro Movement, which advocates for freedom of speech and democracy in Cuba. Otero Alcántara was arrested during significant anti-government protests in 2021. His case has contributed to ongoing diplomatic tensions between the US and Cuba.
latest.full_brief: Luis Manuel Otero Alcántara, a prominent Cuban dissident, has gone into exile in the US after serving a five-year prison sentence. He is the leader of the San Isidro Movement, which advocates for freedom of speech and democracy in Cuba. Otero Alcántara was arrested during significant anti-government protests in 2021. His case has contributed to ongoing diplomatic tensions between the US and Cuba.

latest.title: Victoria announces new social media ‘demasking’ powers for accounts accused of vilification
latest.summary: Victoria is proposing new laws that would allow social media platforms to identify anonymous users accused of vilification. The reforms aim to protect children online by lowering the legal threshold for suing platforms for negligence.
latest.details: Victoria is proposing new laws that would allow social media platforms to identify anonymous users accused of vilification. The reforms aim to protect children online by lowering the legal threshold for suing platforms for negligence. The Victorian civil and administrative tribunal would gain 'demasking' powers under these proposed changes. The government insists that these laws will be introduced as a priority despite opposition skepticism.
latest.full_brief: Victoria is proposing new laws that would allow social media platforms to identify anonymous users accused of vilification. The reforms aim to protect children online by lowering the legal threshold for suing platforms for negligence. The Victorian civil and administrative tribunal would gain 'demasking' powers under these proposed changes. The government insists that these laws will be introduced as a priority despite opposition skepticism.

latest.title: How new bird show hopes to help endangered flyers
latest.summary: Exotic and endangered birds from across the world have found a new home in County Durham as part of a history-inspired theme park. Curators hope they can be used to help save their cousins in the wild.
latest.details: Exotic and endangered birds from across the world have found a new home in County Durham as part of a history-inspired theme park. Curators hope they can be used to help save their cousins in the wild. The Lost Feather is one of five new shows launching at the Kynren site in July, focusing specifically on birds. The show aims to inspire visitors to work in conservation and feel a connection to the birds.
latest.full_brief: Exotic and endangered birds from across the world have found a new home in County Durham as part of a history-inspired theme park. Curators hope they can be used to help save their cousins in the wild. The Lost Feather is one of five new shows launching at the Kynren site in July, focusing specifically on birds. The show aims to inspire visitors to work in conservation and feel a connection to the birds.

latest.title: Perseid meteors to light up night sky in one of the year's most active showers
latest.summary: The Perseid meteor shower is one of the brightest and fastest meteor showers of the year. It occurs when Earth passes through the debris of Comet 109P/Swift-Tuttle.
latest.details: The Perseid meteor shower is one of the brightest and fastest meteor showers of the year. It occurs when Earth passes through the debris of Comet 109P/Swift-Tuttle. The shower will peak overnight on the 12-13 August, coinciding with the new Moon for ideal viewing conditions. During its peak, up to 150 meteors per hour can be visible.
latest.full_brief: The Perseid meteor shower is one of the brightest and fastest meteor showers of the year. It occurs when Earth passes through the debris of Comet 109P/Swift-Tuttle. The shower will peak overnight on the 12-13 August, coinciding with the new Moon for ideal viewing conditions. During its peak, up to 150 meteors per hour can be visible.

brief_methodology.pl: Komentarz powstaje wyłącznie z przeczytanego tekstu artykułu. Musi przejść niezależny przegląd AI oraz pełną kontrolę językową; surowy tekst artykułu lub RSS nie może być komentarzem awaryjnym.
brief_methodology.en: A comment is created only from the retrieved article text. It must pass an independent AI review and the complete language gate; raw article or RSS text is never a fallback comment.

comment_quality_gate.pl: Publikowany jest wyłącznie komentarz utworzony z tekstu artykułu, zatwierdzony w niezależnym przeglądzie AI i przyjęty w całości przez rygorystyczną kontrolę językową. Jedno wadliwe zdanie odrzuca cały komentarz.
comment_quality_gate.en: Only an article-derived comment approved by an independent AI review and accepted in full by the strict language gate is published. One defective sentence rejects the whole comment.

same_story_dedupe.rule: One underlying event gets one homepage card, even if multiple publishers cover it with different links.
